responsibilities: Lead workstreams within client engagements, structuring problems and developing data-driven recommendations for business challenges
Manage day-to-day client relationships, serving as primary point of contact for engagement deliverables and updates
Build comprehensive financial and operational models to evaluate strategic options and quantify business impact
Facilitate client workshops and executive presentations to align stakeholders on findings, recommendations, and implementation plans
Mentor and review work of junior analysts and associates to ensure quality and rigor of engagement deliverables
Conduct competitive and market analysis to inform client strategy across growth, cost reduction, or operational initiatives
Develop implementation roadmaps and change management plans to support client adoption of recommended solutions
Manage project timelines, budgets, and resource allocation to ensure on-time, on-budget delivery of client engagements
